ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT RACHEL DEMAESTRI'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PRESENTED CREDIBLE EVIDENCE SUFFICIENT TO OVERCOME THE PRESUMPTION OF VALIDITY OF THE REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER'S DECLARATION OF SERVICE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Mar-28-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
RACHEL DEMAESTRI, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)933-5854, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT RACHEL DEMAESTRI'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PRESENTED CREDIBLE EVIDENCE SUFFICIENT TO OVERCOME THE PRESUMPTION OF VALIDITY OF THE REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER'S DECLARATION OF SERVICE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/PM)
